message:
🔥 Remove Human vs AI Balance card from ACMM dashboard (#8426)

* 🔥 acmm: remove Human vs AI Balance card (now redundant)

The slider + dual area charts on the Role + Next Steps card now cover
the same AI/Human balance visualization, and they're interactive (the
user drags to explore different levels). The standalone balance card
is redundant — remove it from:

- Dashboard default cards (acmm.ts)
- Card registry + lazy import (cardRegistry.ts)
- Card metadata (cardMetadata.ts)
- Card config + re-export (cards/index.ts)
- Component file (ACMMBalance.tsx) — deleted
- Config file (acmm-balance.ts) — deleted

Remaining 3-card layout: Current Level (5w) + Role+Next Steps (7w) on
row 1, Feedback Loop Inventory full-width (12w) on row 2.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: level-up button targets next level (not earned level)

For L1 repos the 'Help me finish' button was invisible because there
are no L1 criteria (L1 is the default state — criteria start at L2).

Fix: the button now targets earnedLevel+1 (the level you're working
toward) instead of earnedLevel (the level you've already earned).

- L1 repos: 'Help me reach L2 (N criteria to go)'
- L4 repos: 'Help me reach L5 (N criteria to go)'
- L5 repos: button hidden (terminal — nothing above)

Same fix applied to the lock-prompt copy.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
